summary: Post-refactor regression for the server.py -> routes/* split (3110-line monolith -> deps.py + 7 router modules). Ran the full existing pytest regression suite under /app/backend/tests/ (backend_test.py + test_digest.py + test_new_features.py + test_year_in_books.py + test_year_share.py). All 106 tests PASS (75s). Frontend smoke (landing -> /api/ -> register -> /library -> /library/stats) loads correctly via the production-style preview URL, no console errors beyond expected 401s on the public landing page when no session cookie is present.
critical_code_review_comments: Refactor looks clean: deps.py owns the singletons (app, api_router, db, client, logger, env vars, STORAGE_DIR). server.py is now 50 lines and only imports the routes/* modules so their @api_router.X decorators register endpoints. Startup hook still seeds Mongo indexes and starts the digest scheduler.

All 32 endpoint paths listed in the review request continue to respond identically (verified by 106 tests covering auth, books CRUD/upload/cover/download/patch/delete, bulk ops, stats, authors, series, categories, digest, year-in-books, public share lifecycle, public token endpoint).

Backend stderr log shows a transient NameError ('SetSourceBody is not defined' in routes/books.py) that occurred mid-edit during hot-reload, but the next reload picked up the fix; current process is healthy and /api/ returns 200. No action needed.
Pre-existing lint warnings (auth.py F841 unused `ip` and books.py F541 empty f-string) carried over from server_old.py — flagged for cleanup but not blocking.
deps.py uses os.environ["MONGO_URL"] / os.environ["DB_NAME"] (fail-fast) — correct per environment-variable rules. CORS still honours CORS_ORIGINS env var.
books.py is 1521 lines — over the 700-line guideline. Consider further splitting epub-parsing, fichub fetch, and AI classification helpers into their own helper module in a follow-up. Not blocking.
test_credentials: Each test registers an ephemeral TEST_ user (per /app/memory/test_credentials.md) and seeds session_token directly in Mongo for Bearer-token auth where needed.
seed_data_creation: All test data is per-test ephemeral (TEST_* users, books, year_in_books_shares, reading_activity) and is cleaned up in module/class teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactor of server.py into routes/* is verified working with zero behavioral regression. The canonical regression command is: `cd /app/backend && MONGO_URL=mongodb://localhost:27017 DB_NAME=test_database REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://genre-sort.preview.emergentagent.com python -m pytest tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_iterN.xml` — completes in ~75s and covers 106 cases across all 32 endpoint groups. If a future change touches deps.py or a routes/*.py file, re-run this same suite; no new tests needed for pure structural changes.
rca of the issue: N/A — pure structural refactor verified to have zero behavioral impact.
